promptSummaries: Set up persistent session logging across work-history.jsonl, recent-chats.jsonl, and prompt-history.jsonl. Update token-minimalist agent memory to retain this behavior across sessions.
summary: Configured session logging system: updated agent memory (MEMORY.md) with instructions to maintain three JSONL tracking files on every summary/significant output. Updated all three files with current session data. No code files edited — this was a process/tooling setup.

promptSummaries: Orient on bundt workspace, playground, landing, docs state. Create plan to finish prev playground, deploy guide, cookbook recipes, and bundt sites. Implement all.
Print a small guide on how to use the playground

Remediate playground: fix Support Queue preset crash, overhaul fragments (extract JSX to components, drop Inter font, add lucide-react, expand catalog to 19+), add Claude Messages API chat integration with user-provided API key
summary:
## Summary

### Bug Fix: Support Queue Preset
The `__resolve_N__` binding placeholders in preset compositions were never resolved to actual fragment instance IDs. Added `resolvePlaceholder()` in `packages/prev/src/composition/engine.ts` that maps `__resolve_0__` → `instances[0].instanceId` before binding resolution. All 6 presets now compose successfully.

### Fragment Overhaul
- **Extracted JSX** from `defineFragment({ render })` into standalone component files (`fragments/components/*.tsx`). Fragment definitions in `fragments/index.tsx` are thin wrappers that import and delegate to components.
- **Removed Inter font** — now uses `system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif` for body text, `JetBrains Mono` for monospace.
- **Added `lucide-react`** — all fragments use Lucide icons (TrendingUp, Table2, BarChart3, Circle, Mail, AlertTriangle, etc.)
- **Shared design tokens** in `fragments/styles.ts` — colors, fonts, card/heading/pill/label styles, status/priority color maps.
- **Expanded catalog from 10 to 19 fragments**:
  - *New*: ProgressTracker, TagCloud, CommandPalette, SparklineCard, PieChart, TeamGrid, TimelineCard, EnvironmentStatus, LogViewer
- **Expanded data sources from 7 to 15**:
  - *New*: deployment-steps, tags, commands, analytics-sparkline, distribution, timeline, environments, logs (live)
- **Added 2 new presets** (6 total):
  - *DevOps Pipeline*: progress tracker + environment status + log viewer + alerts
  - *Project Overview*: team grid + timeline + pie chart + tag cloud

### Claude Chat Integration
- **New file**: `src/chat.ts` — Messages API proxy with agentic tool-use loop
- User provides their own Anthropic API key via a password input in the UI (stored client-side only, sent per-request in the POST body)
- Server proxies to `api.anthropic.com/v1/messages` with prev's MCP tool definitions (`compose_frame`, `mutate_frame`, `list_fragments`, `list_data_sources`, `get_frame_state`, `query_data`, `navigate_history`)
- Runs an agent loop (up to 5 iterations) — Claude calls tools, server executes them via `mcpHandler.handleToolCall()`, feeds results back
- When `compose_frame` or `mutate_frame` returns a `frameId`, the UI loads the frame in the workspace iframe
- Chat history maintained per session server-side
- UI has two modes: "Instant" (presets + intent) and "Chat with Claude" (conversational)

### Playground HTML
- Removed Inter font, uses system fonts + JetBrains Mono
- Added mode tabs (Instant / Chat with Claude)
- Added chat panel with API key input, message history, and send button
- Updated header with fragment/source counts
- Updated footer to use monospace font

### Earlier in session
- Verified playground Phases 1-8 locally (server starts, all endpoints 200)
- Fixed Dockerfile for monorepo workspace subset (no lockfile, granular COPY, removed NODE_ENV=production)
- Docker image builds and runs, all endpoints verified at 200
- Created `.github/workflows/deploy-playground.yml` (GHCR + SSH to EC2)
- Created `.claude/specs/EC2_PLAYGROUND_DEPLOY.md` deployment guide
- Added 3 new cookbook recipes to landing site (prev-agent-dashboard, prev-playground-deploy, support-dashboard) — 8 total
- Added Showcase section to landing homepage
- Added Playground link to landing nav bar

promptSummaries: Fix landing page WebGL context loss, update card tiles with 4-letter abbreviations and lucide icons in center, polish Setup page for technical accuracy
summary:
## Task 1: HeroScene WebGL Fix + Card Redesign
- Removed MeshReflectorMaterial (renders scene twice, GPU-heavy) — replaced with simple meshStandardMaterial ground plane
- Removed shadows (castShadow, shadow map) — eliminates PCFSoftShadowMap deprecation warning
- Removed EffectComposer + Bloom post-processing — major GPU savings
- Removed Environment preset — no longer needs HDR environment map
- Added webglcontextlost event listener with preventDefault() for recovery
- Added failIfMajorPerformanceCaveat: false to GL config
- Card tiles now show 4-letter abbreviation (CLEO, PREV, DXDC, OLLM, SGNL, HTOA, WAVY) in top-right corner
- Card tiles now render a relevant icon in center via canvas 2D path drawing (terminal, layout, file-text, cpu, activity, chain-link, waves)
- Icon uses gradient stroke matching package colors

## Task 2: Setup Page Polish
- Restructured from flat 7-step list to organized sections: Prerequisites, @bundt/cleo, Other Packages
- Added table of contents with anchor navigation
- Added lucide-react icons throughout (Terminal, Bot, Package, etc.)
- Added copy button with checkmark feedback on code blocks
- Added warning callouts (amber) for cost/billing notes
- Added verify sections for confirming installation
- Other Packages section covers prev, dxdocs, ollama with install commands and cookbook links
- Each section has its own icon, description, and visual hierarchy
- Re: @bundt/installer — deferred; current setup guide is comprehensive enough without a new package

Installed lucide-react@0.577.0 as dependency.

promptSummaries: Polish/audit cookbook recipes for technical accuracy. Keep 5 high-quality recipes, remove 3 lesser ones. Review actual cleo CLI flags, TUI keybindings, task template schema, history/rollback behavior, registry schema, and prev API surface against source code.
summary:
## Cookbook Recipe Audit & Polish

### Removed recipes (3):
- 'Multi-Agent TUI Workflows' — covered adequately in Setup and SDLC recipe
- 'Reusable Task Templates with BCP Context' — merged into SDLC recipe steps
- 'Deploy the prev Playground' — basic Docker recipe, not enough depth
- 'Generate a Docs Site from Markdown' — too thin (3 steps), covered in Setup page

### Retained and deeply polished (5):
1. **Rapid Agent Experimentation with History** — 6 steps (was 4). Added: validate-as-snapshot workflow, A/B testing practical example, detailed history --id --detail output, explanation of rollback-creates-event behavior, db file location (.claude/cleo-history.db)
2. **Run a Custom Agent Registry** — 6 steps (was 4). Added: hosting options step, install-from-registry step, detailed schema explanation (Zod validation), CORS note, --deep search context display
3. **Agent-Composed Dashboard with prev** — 5 steps (was 4). Added: architecture overview step, complete import surface, IntentComposition constraints API, createPrevServer batteries-included option with full route table
4. **Full-Stack AI App: Support Dashboard** — 6 steps (was 4). Added: end-to-end curl test step, subscription lifecycle commentary, WebSocket message type documentation, __resolve_N__ placeholder explanation
5. **End-to-End AI SDLC Pipeline** — 7 steps (was 6). Added: dry-run verification step, TUI dispatch keybinding detail, session navigation, BCP context assembly explanation, rollback-in-pipeline workflow

### Technical accuracy fixes:
- Task templates stored in .claude/tasks/ (not .cleo/tasks/) — corrected
- cleo task --save flag (not positional --save) — verified against CLI
- TUI: Ctrl+T opens template picker (not generic), Tab cycles model, Shift+Tab opens agent selector
- History actions: install, uninstall, init, create-skill, rollback (validate also snapshots)
- Registry schema: qualifiedName has namespace/name/tag/version, skills array optional
- prev imports: defineFragment/defineDataSource from '@bundt/prev', server utils from '@bundt/prev/server'
- createPrevServer config: port, hostname, dbPath, fragments, dataSources, thirdParty, chat, devMode
- WebSocket routes: /prev/ws (not /ws)
- Compose endpoint: /prev/compose (not /api/compose)
- Frame routes: /prev/frame/:id (not /frame/:id)

Updated Showcase component recipe count from 8 to 5.
